---
title: "「接触8割削減」の科学的根拠（改訂版）"
author: "岩本康志"
date: 2026-02-23
format: html
editor: visual
execute: 
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
# Age-structured SIR model
# COVID_Age3_2020

library(tidyverse)
library(deSolve)

# ---- 0. 設定 ----
# 時間と計算方法の設定
set_control <- function(time_begin = 0, time_end, increment = 0.1,
                        method = "rk4") {
  times <- seq(time_begin, time_end, by = increment)
  list(
    time_begin = time_begin, time_end = time_end,
    increment = increment, times = times, method = method
  )
}

# 人口の設定
set_population <- function(N0 = 1, I0 = 10e-6,
                           contact_matrix = NULL, susceptibility = NULL) {
  dimens <- length(N0)
  if (is.null(names(N0))) {
    if (dimens == 1) {
      names(N0) <- "all"
    } else {
      names(N0) <- as.character(seq(1:dimens))
    }
  }
  if (is.null(susceptibility)) {
    susceptibility <- rep(1, times = dimens)
  }
  if (is.null(contact_matrix)) {
    contact_matrix <- matrix(N0, nrow = dimens, ncol = dimens)
  }
  
  contact_matrix <- susceptibility * contact_matrix
  eigen <- max(Re(eigen(contact_matrix)$values))
  contact_matrix <- contact_matrix / eigen
  Zeros <- rep(0, times = dimens)
  
  initial_conditions <- I0
  
  list(
    contact_matrix = contact_matrix,
    demography_vector = N0,
    initial_conditions = initial_conditions,
    susceptibility = susceptibility,
    dimens = dimens
  )
}

# 疫学パラメータの設定
set_parms <- function(compartment, r0 = 2.5,
                      gamma = 1 / 4.8, epsilon = 1 / 5) {
  beta0 <- gamma * r0
  
  if (compartment == "SIR") {
    list(
      compartment = compartment,
      beta0 = beta0, gamma = gamma
    )
  } else if (compartment == "SEIR") {
    list(
      compartment = compartment,
      beta0 = beta0, gamma = gamma, epsilon = epsilon
    )
  }
}

# 介入の設定
set_intervention <- function(time_begin = control$time_begin,
                             time_end = control$time_end,
                             reduction = 0) {
  list(time_begin = time_begin, time_end = time_end, reduction = reduction)
}

# ファクターXの設定
set_input <- function(population, intervention, control) {
  
  set_reduction_list <- function(intervention, times, increment, dimens) {
    with(intervention, {
      times_begin <- as.integer(time_begin / increment) + 1L
      times_end <- as.integer(time_end / increment)
      x <- matrix(0, nrow = dimens, ncol = length(times))
      x[, (times_begin + 1L):(times_end + 1L)] <- reduction
      x
    })
  }
  
  if (is.null(intervention)) {
    reduction_combined <- matrix(0, nrow = population$dimens, ncol = length(control$times))
  } else {
    reduction_list <- map(
      intervention,
      \(x) set_reduction_list(x, control$times, control$increment, population$dimens)
    )
    reduction_combined <- reduce(reduction_list, `+`)
  }
  Ones <- matrix(1, nrow = length(control$times), ncol = population$dimens)
  X <- Ones - t(reduction_combined)
  colnames(X) <- names(population$demography_vector)
  X
}

# SIRモデルの解を求める
model_sir <- function(scenario = "default", aggr = FALSE) {
  
  func_sir <- function(t, y, parms, input_list, population) {
    with(c(parms, population), {
      S <- y[1:dimens]
      I <- y[(dimens + 1):(2L * dimens)]
      R <- y[(2L * dimens + 1):(3L * dimens)]
      
      beta <- beta0 * map_vec(input_list, \(f) f(t))
      J <- contact_matrix %*% I
      New <- beta * (S / demography_vector) * J
      
      dS <- -New
      dI <- New - gamma * I
      dR <- gamma * I
      
      list(c(dS, dI, dR))
    })
  }
  
  Zeros <- rep(0, times = population$dimens)
  population$initial_conditions <- c(
    S = population$demography_vector - population$initial_conditions,
    I = population$initial_conditions,
    R = Zeros
  )
  X <- set_input(population, intervention, control)
  input_list <- map(names(population$demography_vector), \(name) approxfun(control$times, X[, name], rule = 2))
  
  out <- ode(
    y = population$initial_conditions,
    times = control$times,
    func = func_sir,
    parms = parms,
    method = control$method,
    input_list = input_list,
    population = population
  )
  
  S <- out[, 2:(population$dimens + 1)]
  I <- out[, (population$dimens + 2):(2L * population$dimens + 1)]
  R <- out[, (2L * population$dimens + 2):(3L * population$dimens + 1)]
  
  beta <- parms$beta0 * t(X)
  J <- population$contact_matrix %*% t(I)
  S_N <- t(S) / population$demography_vector
  New <- t((beta * S_N) * J)
  
  out_df <- cbind(out[, 1], S, I, R, New)
  colnames(out_df) <- c(
    "times",
    str_c("S_", names(population$demography_vector)),
    str_c("I_", names(population$demography_vector)),
    str_c("R_", names(population$demography_vector)),
    str_c("New_", names(population$demography_vector))
  )
  out_df <- as_tibble(out_df) |>
    pivot_longer(cols = -times, names_to = "names", values_to = "value") |>
    separate(col = names, into = c("compartment", "demography_group"), sep = "_") |>
    pivot_wider(names_from = compartment, values_from = value) |>
    mutate(scenario = scenario)
  if (aggr == TRUE) {
    out_df <- out_df |>
      group_by(times) |>
      summarize(S = sum(S), I = sum(I), R = sum(R), New = sum(New)) |>
      mutate(scenario = scenario)
  }
  out_df
}

# SEIRモデルの解を求める
model_seir <- function(scenario = "default", aggr = FALSE) {
  
  func_seir <- function(t, y, parms, input_list, population) {
    with(c(parms, population), {
      S <- y[1:dimens]
      E <- y[(dimens + 1):(2L * dimens)]
      I <- y[(2L * dimens + 1):(3L * dimens)]
      R <- y[(3L * dimens + 1):(4L * dimens)]
      
      beta <- beta0 * map_vec(input_list, \(f) f(t))
      J <- contact_matrix %*% I
      New <- beta * (S / demography_vector) * J
      
      dS <- -New
      dE <- New - epsilon * E
      dI <- epsilon * E - gamma * I
      dR <- gamma * I
      
      list(c(dS, dE, dI, dR))
    })
  }
  
  Zeros <- rep(0, times = population$dimens)
  population$initial_conditions <- c(
    S = population$demography_vector - population$initial_conditions,
    E = Zeros,
    I = population$initial_conditions,
    R = Zeros
  )
  X <- set_input(population, intervention, control)
  input_list <- map(names(population$demography_vector), \(name) approxfun(control$times, X[, name], rule = 2))
  
  out <- ode(
    y = population$initial_conditions,
    times = control$times,
    func = func_seir,
    parms = parms,
    method = control$method,
    input_list = input_list,
    population = population
  )
  
  S <- out[, 2:(population$dimens + 1)]
  E <- out[, (population$dimens + 2):(2L * population$dimens + 1)]
  I <- out[, (2L * population$dimens + 2):(3L * population$dimens + 1)]
  R <- out[, (3L * population$dimens + 2):(4L * population$dimens + 1)]
  
  beta <- parms$beta0 * t(X)
  J <- population$contact_matrix %*% t(I)
  S_N <- t(S) / population$demography_vector
  New <- t((beta * S_N) * J)
  
  out_df <- cbind(out[, 1], S, E, I, R, New)
  colnames(out_df) <- c(
    "times",
    str_c("S_", names(population$demography_vector)),
    str_c("E_", names(population$demography_vector)),
    str_c("I_", names(population$demography_vector)),
    str_c("R_", names(population$demography_vector)),
    str_c("New_", names(population$demography_vector))
  )
  out_df <- as_tibble(out_df) |>
    pivot_longer(cols = -times, names_to = "names", values_to = "value") |>
    separate(col = names, into = c("compartment", "demography_group"), sep = "_") |>
    pivot_wider(names_from = compartment, values_from = value) |>
    mutate(scenario = scenario)
  if (aggr == TRUE) {
    out_df <- out_df |>
      group_by(times) |>
      summarize(S = sum(S), E = sum(E), I = sum(I), R = sum(R), New = sum(New)) |>
      mutate(scenario = scenario)
  }
  out_df
}

# 新規感染者数のグラフ
plot_New <- function(data, variable, title = "") {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = times)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = New, colour = scenario)) +
    labs(
      title = title, x = "流行時刻（日）", y = "新規感染者数（人/日）",
      colour = ""
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "inside", legend.position.inside = c(0.8, 0.7))
}

# 感染者数のグラフ
plot_I <- function(data, variable, title = "") {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = times)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = I, colour = scenario)) +
    labs(
      title = title, x = "流行時刻（日）", y = "感染者数（人）",
      colour = ""
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "inside", legend.position.inside = c(0.8, 0.7))
}
```

# 1. モデルC

## 図1-2 4月3日資料の再現
```{r}
# ---- 1. モデルB ----
# 3月19日資料の再現
N0_jp <- c(c = 15758424, a = 76499828, e = 35185241)
N_all <- sum(N0_jp)
I0_jp <- c(0, 10, 0)

alpha_c <- 0.009
alpha_a <- 0.630
alpha_e <- 1 - alpha_c - alpha_a
susceptibility <- c(alpha_c, alpha_a, alpha_e) / N0_jp

# ---- 3. モデルC ----
# 4月3日資料の再現
control <- set_control(time_end = 50)
I0_jp <- c(0, 1, 0)
population <- set_population(N0_jp, I0_jp)
parms <- set_parms(compartment = "SIR")

## シナリオ3
intervention <- list(set_intervention(time_begin = 30, reduction = 0))
result_03 <- model_sir(scenario = "削減なし", aggr = TRUE)

## シナリオ4
intervention <- list(set_intervention(time_begin = 30, reduction = 0.2))
result_04 <- model_sir(scenario = "2割削減", aggr = TRUE)

## シナリオ5
intervention <- list(set_intervention(time_begin = 30, reduction = 0.8))
result_05 <- model_sir(scenario = "8割削減", aggr = TRUE)

## 新規感染者数のグラフ
rbind(result_03, result_04, result_05) |>
  plot_New() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 50), breaks = seq(0, 50, 10)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10000), breaks = seq(0, 10000, 2000)) +
  scale_colour_discrete(limits = c("削減なし", "2割削減", "8割削減"),
                        labels = c("流行対策なし", "20%の接触減", "80%の接触減"))
```

# 2.モデルD

## 図1-5 4月9日資料の修正
```{r}
# ---- 4. モデルD ----
# 4月9日資料の再現
control <- set_control(time_end = 90)
h_line <- rep(100, length(control$times))

## シナリオ10
intervention <- list(set_intervention(time_begin = 22, reduction = 0.8))
result_10 <- model_sir(scenario = "8割削減", aggr = TRUE)

## シナリオ11
intervention <- list(set_intervention(time_begin = 22, reduction = 0.7))
result_11 <- model_sir(scenario = "7割削減", aggr = TRUE)

## 新規感染者数のグラフ
h_line_New <- list(times = control$times,
                 New = h_line, 
                 scenario = rep("100人", times = length(control$times)))
rbind(result_10, result_11) |>
  select(times, New, scenario) |>
  rbind(h_line_New) |>
  plot_New() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 60), breaks = seq(0, 60, 10)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 700), breaks = seq(0, 700, 100)) +
  scale_colour_manual(limits = c("8割削減", "7割削減"),
                      labels = c("短期で8割の接触減", "短期で7割の接触減"),
                      values = c("blue", "grey"))
```
